hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | { read -r cmd; case "$cmd" in backlog\ *|backlog) BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [[ -n "$BRANCH" && "$BRANCH" != "HEAD" ]]; then git add backlog/ && git commit -m "Backlog auto-sync" 2>/dev/null; git push -u origin "$BRANCH"; fi;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.skill // empty' | grep -qiF backlog && { BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [[ -n "$BRANCH" && "$BRANCH" != "HEAD" ]]; then git add backlog/ && git commit -m "Backlog auto-sync" 2>/dev/null; git push -u origin "$BRANCH"; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true

BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [[ -n "$BRANCH" && "$BRANCH" != "HEAD" ]]; then git add backlog/ && git commit -m "Backlog auto-sync" 2>/dev/null; git push -u origin "$BRANCH" 2>/dev/null; fi || true
